entry.title: 973. K Closest Points to Origin
entry.content:
LeetCode

Detailed explanation for all 3 methods bellow

Approach 1: Sort

Min heap, Time Complexity: O(KlogN)



The last solution is based on quick sort, we can also call it Quick Select____ -> Swapping sort (quick sort)

entry.title: 1268. Search Suggestions System
entry.content:
LeetCode

link
Approach 1: Trie, Time: O(key_length), Space: O(ALPHABET_SIZE key_length N) where N is number of keys in Trie

link
Approach 2: Sort and Binary Search the Prefix
